mapper.select: select * from law_knowledge where is_deleted = 0
select * from law_knowledge where is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select * from law_knowledge where law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0
select * from law_knowledge where law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select * from law_knowledge where (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) and is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select * from law_knowledge where (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) and law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from law_knowledge where is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from law_knowledge where law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from law_knowledge where (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from law_knowledge where (title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')) and law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0

select count(*) from law_knowledge where is_deleted = 0
and (title like concat('%', #{term}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{term}, '%'))

select count(*) from law_knowledge where law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0
and (title like concat('%', #{term}, '%') or content like concat('%', #{term}, '%'))
select * from law_knowledge where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: insert into law_knowledge (title, chapter, `section`, article_number, content, law_type, effective_date, expiry_date, status, source, publisher, publish_date, user_id, create_time) values (#{title}, #{chapter}, #{section}, #{articleNumber}, #{content}, #{lawType}, #{effectiveDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{status}, #{source}, #{publisher}, #{publishDate}, #{userId}, now())
mapper.update: update law_knowledge set title = #{title}, chapter = #{chapter}, section = #{section}, article_number = #{articleNumber}, content = #{content}, law_type = #{lawType}, vector_status = #{vectorStatus}, status = #{status}, effective_date = #{effectiveDate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, publisher = #{publisher}, publish_date = #{publishDate} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: update law_knowledge set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select * from law_knowledge where MATCH(title, content) AGAINST(#{booleanQuery} IN BOOLEAN MODE) and is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select * from law_knowledge where MATCH(title, content) AGAINST(#{booleanQuery} IN BOOLEAN MODE) and law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(*) from law_knowledge where MATCH(title, content) AGAINST(#{booleanQuery} IN BOOLEAN MODE) and is_deleted = 0
select count(*) from law_knowledge where MATCH(title, content) AGAINST(#{booleanQuery} IN BOOLEAN MODE) and law_type = #{lawType} and is_deleted = 0
select * from law_knowledge where vector_status = 0 and is_deleted = 0 limit 100
select * from law_knowledge where vector_status = 0 and is_deleted = 0 limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from law_knowledge where vector_status = 0 and is_deleted = 0
